import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { ReactiveFormsModule } from '@angular/forms'; import { FormGroup, FormBuilder } from '@angular/forms'; @Component({ selector: 'app-sign-up', templateUrl: './sign-up.component.html', styleUrls: ['./sign-up.component.css'], }) export class SignUpComponent implements OnInit { public signupForm!: FormGroup; constructor(private formBuilder: FormBuilder) {} ngOnInit(): void { this.signupForm = this.formBuilder.group({ fullname: [''], email: [''], password: [''], mobile: [''], }); } }
